name: Disability Supports Deduction & Accessible Home Exception
description: Complete Elias Thorne's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Use the tax documents and taxpayer memo located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\thorne\. Optimize the $6,500 adaptive technology and $3,700 guide dog expenses between the Disability Supports Deduction (Form T929) and Medical Expenses (Line 33099). Claim the $10,000 Home Buyers' Amount (Line 31270) using the DTC exception. Save the completed return as 'elias_thorne.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T929 (Disability Supports Deduction) 2024; Line 31270 (Home buyers' amount)
metadata.key_complexity: Optimization between Form T929 and Medical Expenses for adaptive technology; Home Buyers' Amount under DTC exception (not a first-time buyer).
